meeting_title: Meridian Works Operations MMS / Voxel - site safety touch base

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Sensitive-inventory monitoring pilot
nonsafety_use_cases.description: Meridian Works Operations has a specific maintenance need, and the team discussed an early-stage pilot to address it.

evidence.quote: We're going to do a pilot.
evidence.speaker: Lane Oakley <fake.lane.oakley@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: The timing is still being worked through.
evidence.speaker: Lane Oakley <fake.lane.oakley@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: of what that will entail, but they had a very specific maintenance need, and we are exploring ways to support it.
evidence.speaker: Lane Oakley <fake.lane.oakley@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: So we put together an early concept to review last week, and we'll keep working on it.
evidence.speaker: Lane Oakley <fake.lane.oakley@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: And so, but the maintenance kind of issue came up as top priority.
evidence.speaker: Lane Oakley <fake.lane.oakley@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: So we put together a way to meet that.
evidence.speaker: Lane Oakley <fake.lane.oakley@voxelai.com>
